nasb.text: When they reached Salamis, they began to proclaim the word of God in the synagogues of the Jews; and they also had John as their helper.

esv.text: When they arrived at Salamis, they proclaimed the word of God in the synagogues of the Jews. And they had John to assist them.

cnv.text: 他們到了撒拉米，就在猶太人的各會堂裡宣講　神的道，還有約翰作他們的助手。

ccb.text: 他们到了撒拉米，就在当地的犹太会堂传讲上帝的道。约翰·马可做他们的助手。

csbs.text: 到了萨拉米斯，就在犹太人的各会堂里传讲神的话语。他们也有约翰马可做助理。
